_note: Edit this file weekly. When you spot a sound trending in your TikTok/IG feed, add it here. The content agent will match drafts to these sounds. Keep 8-15 active. Mark stale ones inactive instead of deleting.

sounds.title: Cinematic motivational build (orchestral swell + drop)
sounds.exampleTrack: any 'Hans Zimmer-style' trending build — search 'cinematic motivational' in TT sound library

sounds.title: POV text-on-screen trend (chill lo-fi beat)
sounds.exampleTrack: rotating lo-fi instrumentals — pick the top trending one this week

sounds.title: Hype trap beat (heavy 808s)
sounds.exampleTrack: Travis Scott / Metro Boomin instrumental trends

sounds.title: Emotional piano (sad-to-hopeful arc)
sounds.exampleTrack: Ludovico Einaudi-style trends, or 'Until I Found You'-type ballads

sounds.title: Fast-cut EDM (drop syncs to clip changes)
Quiet ambient under voiceover
sounds.exampleTrack: any soft ambient pad — minimal so the voiceover carries

sounds.title: Nostalgic 2010s pop (slowed + reverb)
sounds.exampleTrack: slowed/reverb covers of pop hits — currently a recurring IG Reels trend

sounds.title: Comedy meme sting (short looping audio)
sounds.exampleTrack: any sub-10-second meme audio currently looping
